data.title: Ferrari raises 2025 revenue outlook to ≥7.1 billion euros, targeting 9.0 billion euros by 2030 with 40% EBITDA margin.
data.description: Ferrari N.V. (RACE) released its 2030 strategic plan and updated financial guidance. For 2025, revenue is projected to be ≥7.1 billion euros, adjusted EBITDA ≥2.72 billion euros, and adjusted EPS ≥8.80 euros. By 2030, they are targeting net revenues of approximately 9.0 billion euros and an EBITDA of at least 3.6 billion euros, aiming for an EBITDA margin of at least 40%. The plan includes a compound annual growth rate of about 5% and focuses on the sports car segment. Shares traded lower following the news. (Words: 92)

data.title: Danish wind developer Orsted to slash 25% of staff amid setbacks in US, focusing on base in Europe.
data.description: Facing setbacks from delays and increased costs, a Danish company is scaling back its operations in the United States after encountering resistance from the Trump administration. The company is redirecting its focus to its base in Europe amid these challenges.

data.title: Polimetal, a subsidiary of ACG Metals Limited, secures 2% NSR royalty over mining license in Niğde Province, Türkiye.
data.description: ACG Metals Limited, based in London, revealed on October 9, 2025, that its subsidiary, Polimetal, has successfully obtained a 2% Net Smelter Return ("NSR") royalty for a mining license area situated in Niğde Province, Çamardı District, Türkiye. This NSR interest marks a significant development for the Company as it continues to expand its presence in the mining sector.

data.title: Talen Energy proposes offering senior notes due 2034 & 2036 in private offerings; exempt from Securities Act.
data.description: Houston, October 9, 2025 - Talen Energy Corporation (“TEC”) announced its plan to offer senior notes due 2034 and 2036 (collectively, the “Notes”) through its subsidiary, Talen Energy Supply, LLC (“TES”). The offerings, which are exempt from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933, will be subject to market conditions. The 2034 Notes and 2036 Notes will be guaranteed jointly and severally by TES’s subsidiaries that currently guarantee its credit agreement obligations. TEC is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TLN.

data.title: Jersey Mike's Subs to donate 20% of sales to Best Buddies International this weekend in NJ. Oct. 9, 2025. #Charity #Community #Donation
data.description: In Manasquan, New Jersey on October 9, 2025, Jersey Mike's Subs, a prominent franchisor of fast casual sandwich shops recognized for its freshly sliced and grilled subs, partnered with Best Buddies International, a nonprofit organization dedicated to promoting inclusive friendships and employment opportunities. This collaboration aims to raise awareness and support for their initiatives.

data.title: Australian Patent Office grants Acurx Patent for DNA Polymerase IIIC Inhibitors - Acurx Pharmaceuticals develops antibiotics.
data.description: Today, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP) based in Staten Island, NY, revealed the development of a novel class of small molecule antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections. The company focuses on late-stage biopharmaceutical research. The announcement was made on October 9, 2025.

data.title: Ballard to hold Q3-2025 results conference call on Nov 13 at 8:00am PT (11:00am ET).
data.description: Ballard Power Systems, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BLDP and on the TSX under the same symbol, is set to conduct a conference call on November 13th, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. PT (11:00 a.m. ET) to discuss their operational performance for the third quarter of 2025. The call will be available for live access...

data.title: Crocs, Inc. will review Q3 2025 earnings on Oct. 30 at 8:30am ET in a conference call for stakeholders.
data.description: In Broomfield, Colorado, on October 9, 2025, the renowned footwear company Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) revealed plans for a conference call on Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 8:30 am ET to delve into the outcomes of its third quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. data.title: Health In Tech will showcase eDIYBS platform at SIIA 2025, aims to boost broker growth and market reach at conference.
data.description: A technology company called Health In Tech, traded on Nasdaq as HIT, will be presenting its innovative Enhanced Do It Yourself Benefit System (eDIYBS) at the SIIA National Conference from October 12 to 14. The system is supported by third-party artificial intelligence technology. The conference will take place in Stuart, Florida, starting on October 9, 2025. Visitors can expect to see the cutting-edge platform in action during the event.
